rationale: Prior attempt failed because Verus rejected the assert-forall blocks for container, thread, and endpoint due to low-confidence auto-chosen triggers (it picked `.contains` over the `get_*` calls in the conclusion). Added explicit `#![trigger ...]` annotations matching the ensures-clause triggers (`post1_self_.get_*` and `post2_self_.get_*`) so both run-1 and run-2 ensures fire on the same instantiation point, then closed each observable equality via `=~=`.
